question: Chapters
feedback: The text does not list the main chapters or sections of the thesis (e.g., Introduction, Literature Review, Methodology, Implementation, Conclusion). It only provides the problem statement and a project timeline.

question: Description
feedback: The text does not describe the contents of any thesis sections. While it describes the problem, it fails to outline what will be covered in the upcoming chapters of the work.

question: Structure
feedback: The general structure of the thesis cannot be understood from this text. The text focuses on the problem statement and the administrative timeline of the work, but lacks a structural outline of the research itself.
